compatibilityNotes.adaptationHint: The workflow steps, models, and parameters are cross-platform. Only shell commands, file paths, and OS-specific package manager calls may need adjustment for a different OS.
Check whether openclaw is installed. The rest of the kit is independent of this runtime.
The core workflow logic is platform-independent. Only the direct chat-specific API calls and configuration may need adjustment if the user's integration target differs.
The core workflow logic is platform-independent. Only the group chat-specific API calls and configuration may need adjustment if the user's integration target differs.
The core workflow logic is platform-independent. Only the heartbeat-driven assistant runtime-specific API calls and configuration may need adjustment if the user's integration target differs.

compatibilityNotes.requirement: Requires service: Local memory files (durable context and reminder state)
compatibilityNotes.adaptationHint: Requires writable workspace files such as MEMORY.md, HEARTBEAT.md, and memory/heartbeat-state.json

compatibilityNotes.requirement: Requires service: Messaging surface (user-visible reminders and replies)
compatibilityNotes.adaptationHint: Requires an agent harness with a message/reply channel

compatibilityNotes.requirement: If the host lacks heartbeat polls, invoke the checklist on a cron or scheduled trigger. If presence data is unavailable, skip presence-aware gating rather than faking it.
